# Tiaki Documentation

> Tiaki is a self-hosted automated container update management system for Docker and Kubernetes. It monitors running containers, detects available image updates, and enables one-click deployments with built-in rollback.

## Docs

- [Introduction](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/intro): Overview, architecture, and key features
- [Installation](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/getting-started/installation): Docker Compose quick start
- [First Agent](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/getting-started/first-agent): Connecting your first Docker agent
- [Dashboard Tour](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/getting-started/dashboard-tour): Overview of the web dashboard

## Configuration

- [Control Plane](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/configuration/control-plane): Environment variables for the server
- [Docker Agent](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/configuration/agent-docker): Docker agent setup and configuration
- [Kubernetes Agent](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/configuration/agent-kubernetes): Kubernetes agent setup and configuration
- [Private Registries](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/configuration/private-registries): Authenticating with private container registries
- [Email Notifications](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/configuration/notifications): SMTP configuration
- [Security Scanning](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/configuration/security-scanning): Trivy CVE scanning integration
- [Git Integration](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/configuration/git-integration): Auto-commit deployments to Git

## Deployment

- [Production Setup](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/deployment/production): Hardening for production use
- [Kubernetes Deployment](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/deployment/kubernetes): Running the control plane on Kubernetes
- [Upgrades](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/deployment/upgrades): Upgrading Tiaki components

## API Reference

- [API Overview](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/api): Agent REST API documentation
- [Register Agent](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/api/register-agent): POST /api/v1/agents/register
- [Agent Heartbeat](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/api/agent-heartbeat): POST /api/v1/agents/heartbeat
- [Submit Report](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/api/submit-report): POST /api/v1/reports/submit
- [Get Commands](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/api/get-commands): GET /api/v1/reports/commands
- [Report Command Result](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/api/report-command-result): POST /api/v1/reports/commands/{commandId}/result

## Developer Guide

- [Architecture](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/developer/architecture): System design and component overview
- [Local Development](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/developer/local-development): Setting up a dev environment
- [Contributing](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/developer/contributing): Contribution guidelines
- [Testing](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/developer/testing): Running and writing tests

## Help

- [Troubleshooting](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/help/troubleshooting): Common issues and fixes
- [FAQ](https://docs.tiaki.dev/docs/help/faq): Frequently asked questions

## Links

- [Website](https://tiaki.dev)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/tiaki-dev/tiaki)
- [Changelog](https://github.com/tiaki-dev/tiaki/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)
- [OpenAPI Spec](https://github.com/tiaki-dev/tiaki/blob/main/proto/api.yaml)
